---
title: "A Bayesian Workflow for Spatially Correlated Random Effects in On-farm Experiment"
date: 2022-08-11
categories: ["Work"]
aliases: ["/posts/BayesOFE_quarto/"]
---

Check out the embedded Quarto HTML file below:
